title: QoM: Excavein
description: Very Powerful & Configurable vein miner type mod
body:
# Excavein
**Excavein** is a powerful & customizable vein mining / building tool. Players can select different modes to gather or place blocks efficiently, making gathering resources and building and more enjoyable.

## Client Configs
### 1.19.2+
  - **Selection Colors**: Changes Selection color. 
  - **Selection Alpha**: Changes Selection Face Alpha. 
  - **Text Shadow**: Whether to have shadow behind of the Selection Text. 
  - **Toggleable Activation Key**: Whether to make the Activation Key Toggleable. 
  - **Disable Scroll**: Whether to disable selection scroll 'use hotkeys to switch modes'. 
  - **Outline Thickness**: Changes Outline thickness. 
  - **Render Outline**: Whether to render the Outline of the Selection. 
  - **Render Face**: Whether to render the Face Texture of the Selection. 
  - **Blur Face**: Whether to blur the Face Texture of the Selection. 
  - **Selection Text Offset**: Offset the position of Selection Text. 
  - **Display Switching Mode in Chat**: Whether to display Current Mode Text above the hotbar or in chat. 
  - **Max Block View**: Maximum of Selected Blocks that can be viewed. 
  - **Text Background**: Whether to have background behind of the Selection Text.
  - **Text Left Side**: Whether to have Selection Text on the left side of the screen.
  - **Xray Outline Selection**: Ability to see your selection through Blocks whether the server allows it also.
 

## Server Configs
### 1.19.2+
  - **Base Cooldown**: Amount of ticks for block selection cooldown. 
  - **Added Cooldown**: Amount of ticks that get added to the block selection cooldown. 
  - **Add Range**: Add range for block selection. 
  - **Max Block**: Maximum number of blocks that can be selected. 
  - **Food Exhaustion Multiplier**: Causes Food Exhaustion to be Multiplied when mining blocks. 
  - **Item Pickup Delay**: Amount of ticks for till you are able to pick up items after blocks drops from selection. 
  - **Invert Whitelist**: Invert the whitelist behavior. 
  - **Requires Mineable**: Require Hand/Tools for said selected blocks that requires hand/tools to drop. 
  - **Requires Tools**: Require Tools for said selected blocks. 
  - **Requires Hunger**: Require Hunger for said selected blocks. 
  - **Send Blocks To Player**: Sends all dropped Items from Blocks to the Player. 
  - **Block Placing**: Ability to Place Blocks by Selection. 
  - **Hand Interaction**: Ability to Interact Blocks using said Hand by Selection. 
  - **Item Interaction**: Ability to Interact Blocks using said Item by Selection. 
  - **Vein(Mode) Block Tags**: List of block tags for vein mining mode as in Start Pos Block Tag needs to match said block in selection with the same tag. 
  - **Requires Fuel Item**: Require Fuel for said selected blocks.
  - **Fuel Exhaustion Amount**: Takes said Vein miner Item Fuel Amount for every Interact/Destroyable Blocks.
  - **Requires XP**: Require XP for said selected blocks.
  - **XP Exhaustion Amount**: Amount of XP ''Points'' to be taken when mining for said block in selection.
  - **No Durability Loss**: Ability to Interact Blocks using said Item by Selection.
  - **Delay Between Break**: Amount of ticks for till next block gets broken.
  - **Blocks Per Break**: Amount of blocks between broken blocks.
  - **Wait Till All Broken**: Waits for all blocks to be broken before doing another selection.
  - **Prevent Breaking Tool**: Prevents Tools being broke when mining/interaction.
  - **Xray Outline Selection**: Ability to Allow Players to see there selection through Blocks.
### 1.21+
  - **Mining Speed Nerf**: Causes to multiply the Mining Speed for every block it accounted for.

ask permission if you want to feature this mod on any other modpages
otherwise you have my permission to feature my mod on modpages as long the download is through the mod project on Modrinth and/or Curseforge
